title: oeceoclades spathulifera
intro: Oeceoclades spathulifera, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of orchid native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Oeceoclades spathulifera often involve infusions of the plant's leaves and roots, and can be consumed as teas or tinctures.
